// EnableAchievementFramework: Master switch. When false, no patches apply and the API returns defaults (no achievements unlocked, zero progress).
// EnableKillTracking: Patch Creature.Die to evaluate KillCreature and KillAny achievements.
// EnableQuestTracking: Patch QuestManager.Update to evaluate CompleteQuest achievements.
// EnableLevelTracking: Patch Player.GrantXP to evaluate ReachLevel achievements after XP is applied.
// EnableSkillTracking: Patch Player.SetSkillLevel to evaluate ReachSkill achievements.
// EnablePropertyTracking: Patch WorldObject.UpdateProperty to evaluate ReachPropertyInt and ReachPropertyFloat achievements.
// BaseFakeBoolId: Starting FakeBool ID for unlock flags. Each achievement index maps to BaseFakeBoolId + index. Must not overlap with other mods.
// BaseFakeIntId: Starting FakeInt ID for progress counters. Each achievement index maps to BaseFakeIntId + index.
// MaxAchievementCount: Maximum number of achievements supported. FakeBool/FakeInt range must accommodate Base + Max.
// NotificationPrefix: Chat prefix for unlock notifications. Empty = no prefix.
// NotifyOnUnlock: When true, send a system chat message to the player on unlock. Individual achievements can override with their Notify field.
// BroadcastOnUnlock: When true, broadcast the unlock message to all players.
// AllowAdminCommands: When true, register /achievementadmin commands for granting, revoking, and inspecting achievements.
// LoremasterTierThresholds: Ordered list of progress-point thresholds that unlock Tier 1, 2, 3, 4 for Loremaster-style ReachProgressPoints achievements. Progress points = uniqueQuestCount + floor(totalKills / KillsPerQuestEquivalent).
// KillsPerQuestEquivalent: How many total creature kills equals one progress point for ReachProgressPoints calculations. Default 100.

Achievements.// Id: Unique identifier used by other mods to gate content. Alphanumeric, no spaces.
Achievements.// Description: Tooltip / chat description of how to earn the achievement.
Achievements.// Category: Group heading for /ach list (e.g. Combat, Exploration, Crafting).
Achievements.// Type: Trigger type: KillCreature, KillAny, CompleteQuest, ReachLevel, ReachSkill, ReachAttribute, ReachPropertyInt, ReachPropertyFloat, Custom.
Achievements.// Target: Context target: creature WCID (int), quest name, skill/attribute/property enum name, or freeform tag for Custom.
Achievements.// RequiredCount: How many times the trigger must occur (default 1).
Achievements.// RequiredValue: For Reach* types: the threshold value (level, skill trained, property value). Ignored for counter types.
Achievements.// Prerequisites: List of achievement Ids that must already be unlocked before this one can progress or unlock.
Achievements.// Rewards: List of rewards granted on first unlock.
Achievements.// Hidden: If true, the achievement is hidden until unlocked (shows as ???).
Achievements.// Notify: If true, send a broadcast message when unlocked. False to suppress (mods may handle their own UI).
Achievements.Name: First Blood
Achievements.Description: Kill any creature.

Achievements.Name: Novice Slayer
Achievements.Description: Kill 100 creatures.

Achievements.Name: Veteran Slayer
Achievements.Description: Kill 1,000 creatures.

Achievements.Name: Drudge Exterminator
Achievements.Description: Kill 500 Drudges.

Achievements.Name: Respecting Your Time
Achievements.Description: Reach level 25 to unlock racial augments for your entire account. Grants: Jack of All Trades, Eye of the Remorseless, Iron Skin of the Invincible, Critical Protection, Infused Life Magic, Hand of the Remorseless, and Might of the Seventh Mule (rank 1).

Achievements.Name: Halfway There
Achievements.Description: Reach character level 50.

Achievements.Name: Centurion
Achievements.Description: Reach character level 100.

Achievements.Name: Questing Spirit
Achievements.Description: Complete 10 quests.

Achievements.Name: War Magic Master
Achievements.Description: Reach trained War Magic skill.

Achievements.Name: Strength of Titans
Achievements.Description: Reach 300 base Strength.

Achievements.Name: Rich and Famous
Achievements.Description: Accumulate 1,000,000 pyreals.

Achievements.Name: Druid
Achievements.Description: The wilds whisper your name. Those who bond with nature's fury may command the swarm.

Achievements.Name: Elementalist
Achievements.Description: The elements stir at your approach. Primal forces answer only to those who have walked through fire and ice.

Achievements.Name: Necromancer
Achievements.Description: The veil between worlds grows thin for you. The dead have always been patient teachers.

Achievements.Name: Enchanter
Achievements.Description: Threads of invisible power weave between all living things. You are learning to pull them.

Achievements.Name: Artificer
Achievements.Description: Every object hums with a secret song. You have begun to hear it.

Achievements.Name: Rogue
Achievements.Description: Shadow is not the absence of light, but a path for those who know how to walk it.

Achievements.Name: Berserker
Achievements.Description: Some abandon thought for fury. The battlefield remembers their names.

Achievements.Name: Crusader
Achievements.Description: Faith and steel are not opposites. They are two edges of the same blade.

Achievements.Name: HOW DID YOU EVEN DO THAT?!
Achievements.Description: Witness a catastrophic tinker failure of truly epic proportions. Chaos grants a permanent 1% XP boost to all who were present.

Achievements.Name: Windwalker
Achievements.Description: The wind carries your blade, and your blade carries the storm.

Achievements.Name: Battlemage
Achievements.Description: Steel and spell are not separate arts — they are the same violence, differently expressed.

Achievements.Name: Death Knight
Achievements.Description: Life is a debt. The void is the collector.

Achievements.Name: Bloodmage
Achievements.Description: Blood is merely borrowed. You are the lender, and you always collect with interest.

Achievements.Name: Seeker of Knowledge
Achievements.Description: Unlock Loremaster Tier 1.

Achievements.Name: Keeper of Secrets
Achievements.Description: Unlock Loremaster Tier 2.

Achievements.Name: Master of Lore
Achievements.Description: Unlock Loremaster Tier 3.

Achievements.Name: Legend of Dereth
Achievements.Description: Unlock Loremaster Tier 4.

Achievements.Name: Reaching Higher
Achievements.Description: Reach level 50 in a challenge run.

Achievements.Name: Climbing Fast
Achievements.Description: Reach level 100 in a challenge run.

Achievements.Name: Halfway to Glory
Achievements.Description: Reach level 150 in a challenge run.

Achievements.Name: Seasoned Challenger
Achievements.Description: Reach level 200 in a challenge run.

Achievements.Name: Veteran
Achievements.Description: Reach level 225 in a challenge run.

Achievements.Name: Elite

Achievements.Name: Paragon

Achievements.Name: Ascendant
